programmes.show_description: Young unwed parents argue over damages to a car during a heated fight, allegations of drug abuse and child engagement. S10, Ep181
A student is accused of punching her friend in the face because she refused to pay for damages to her car. S10, Ep182
A contractor tries to lend a helping hand by hiring struggling workers; he is sued by his boss when items from the job site allegedly start to go missing. S23, Ep145
A man claims his daughter was punched in the face repeatedly by his live-in lover's ten-year-old son; she denies all claims. S23, Ep146
A man spends the night in jail after the mother of his four children accuses him of kicking her in the thigh; he says he has a video of the incident. S23, Ep147
A dog owner has the nerve to compare his pit bull, which inflicts puncture wounds on a neighbour's Chihuahua, to a lovable cartoon character. S23, Ep148
A woman, in need of a break, drops off her children with her mother-in-law and then allegedly breaks a door down to get them back a week later. S23, Ep149
A teenager tries to act out what she sees on YouTube; a classmate's laptop is allegedly destroyed in the process. S23, Ep150
A woman moves to Florida and leaves her son in charge of her condo; he allegedly takes thousands from a tenant to make late mortgage payments. S23, Ep151
An angry father claims his son spent 6 months in jail after a 12-year-old falsely accused him of assault and battery. S10, Ep176
A woman blames her ex-boyfriend for dog pound fees, stolen wine and damages to the basement he rented from her. S10, Ep177
When a teacher disappears, his wife receives letters saying that he needed a clean break. Investigators suspect foul play, but without a body, the case would be difficult to prove. S8, Ep37
A teenager is killed by her parents. They claim it was in self-defence, but forensic evidence indicates otherwise. Definite proof comes from an unlikely source. S8, Ep38
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Lora Sinner wanted a new start and new friends, but newfound friendships turn to jealousy and they stage Lora's 'accidental' death during a camping trip. S1, Ep17
When Landy Martinez is found dead in his home, an investigation reveals a toxic past relationship that wasn't ready to be over. S1, Ep18
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A retired UPS driver reveals new details about cult leader David Koresh and what led up to the deadly standoff with law enforcement nearly 25 years ago. S30, Ep10
When a doctor is accused of assaulting two female patients, his DNA fails to match the crimes. S6, Ep18
When the clerk of an Atlanta-area smoke shop is gunned down during a robbery, investigators have only descriptions of the killers and the make of their getaway car. S18, Ep10
When the wife of a farmer goes missing, remarkably, the study of tree ring growth helps investigators to solve the case. S6, Ep20
California police are baffled when an innocent man's DNA is found at the scene of a deadly home invasion. S18, Ep11
Police lead a countrywide manhunt looking for a couple who have killed people at multiple pizza shops. A survivor gives his eyewitness account of the crime. S1, Ep19
Soap star Gemma McCluskie's body was found in a suitcase floating in a river. Security footage would reveal who was carrying the suitcase she was found in. S1, Ep20
Ambition, greed and gunshots at a Napa Valley winery - how did a bag with $800,000 in cash lead to murder in a vineyard? S30, Ep11
In the deadliest train crash in US history, forty-seven were killed and many more injured. Clues to the cause lay etched in twisted steel and buried in the mud of the Bayou Canot. S8, Ep41
A fire at Kings Cross Underground Station kills 31 people. Investigators pinpoint the cause of the fire, but it takes state-of-the-art technology to explain why it became deadly. S8, Ep42
A murder investigation leads the authorities to a discarded sleeping bag containing traces of an horrific act. S9, Ep1
A woman's apparent accidental death begins to look fishy after police uncover a letter written by the victim. S9, Ep2
A woman sues her ex-husband for the return of alimony she allegedly overpaid; the Judge orders them to leave the courtroom until they come up with a figure they both agree upon. S23, Ep152
A woman sues a horse trainer for a refund when the fitting of a horse saddle doesn't work out; the Judge admits she's not much of a rider. S23, Ep153
Car windows are allegedly busted out when the battle over a beloved dog does not go a woman's way. S23, Ep154
A woman sues for the court max when she discovers that she was allegedly duped into moving into a condemned studio apartment. S23, Ep155
A contractor is paid $20,000 to put in a driveway that his client says she cannot turn around in. S23, Ep156
An elderly woman tries to collect her money from the family of a deceased friend for a final cruise they had planned together. S23, Ep157
After a mother's death, sisters fight over the car she left behind and what tragically happened to it after going on a cruise. S23, Ep158
A bartender claims that money spent to customise his SUV was a gift from his younger girlfriend and that he owes her nothing. S10, Ep183
A photographer sues an author for using his pictures on her book cover; she accuses him of sexual harassment. S10, Ep184
After a car accident, a teenager claims an intoxicated partygoer gave him permission to drive. A man accuses his ex-girlfriend of spending his money on herself. S10, Ep185
Unwed parents fight over custody of their child amid claims of drug use and violence. A woman demands that her son's ex-girlfriend pay her back for a car. S10, Ep186
Collect calls from prison, stolen baby formula and an assault divide a man and his mother. Feuding roommates debate unpaid rent, bad credit and incompatibility. S10, Ep187
Ex-roommates accuse each other of theft, vandalism and death threats. A pet-shop customer is bitten by a bird and sues for damages; store owners claims it's a scam. S10, Ep188

The discovery of vital evidence helps detectives piece together the case. S9, Ep3

Ex-lovers dispute sharing the cost of medical bills resulting from the miscarriage of their baby. A young woman is left with $18K of credit card debt. S10, Ep191
